diagrams.title: AND Gate Symbol and Truth Table
diagrams.description: Standard AND gate symbol with curved input side and pointed output side, showing that output is 1 only when all inputs are 1
elements: Symbol with inputs A, B and output Y
diagrams.purpose: Learn basic AND gate representation and behavior

diagrams.title: OR Gate Symbol and Truth Table
diagrams.description: Standard OR gate symbol with curved input side and curved output side, showing output 1 when any input is 1
elements: Symbol with inputs A, B and output Y
diagrams.purpose: Learn OR gate operation and symbol

diagrams.title: XOR Gate Symbol and Truth Table
diagrams.description: XOR gate symbol with extra curved line on input side, outputs 1 when inputs differ
elements: Truth table showing odd parity detection
diagrams.purpose: Understand exclusive OR operation and applications

diagrams.title: NAND Gate as Universal Gate
diagrams.description: Shows how NAND gate can be configured to create NOT, AND, and OR gates demonstrating universality

diagrams.title: De Morgan's Theorem Visualization
diagrams.description: Visual proof of De Morgan's theorems using gate symbols and bubbles
diagrams.purpose: Visualize theorem application in circuit simplification
